seoTitle: Palm Grove vs Palm Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Palm Grove and Palm Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Palm Grove vs Palm Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Palm Grove and Palm Island.
heading: Palm Grove vs Palm Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Palm Grove, Queensland and Palm Island, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Palm Grove and Palm Island have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Palm Grove or Palm Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Palm Grove has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Palm Island scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Palm Grove scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Palm Island scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Palm Grove or Palm Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Palm Grove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
